review_text: Absolutely love this product! My digestion has improved significantly after just two weeks of daily use.
The aloe vera juice has really helped with my acidity and bloating. Feel lighter and more energetic throughout the day.
Good quality product, noticed improvement in skin hydration after regular use for about a month.
The taste is quite bitter and hard to get used to. I struggle to drink it every morning.
Way too expensive for the quantity you get. Similar products available at half the price on Amazon.
After taking these capsules for a month, my stress levels have reduced noticeably and sleep quality has improved dramatically.
These capsules genuinely helped me manage work stress. Felt calmer and more focused within 3 weeks.
Saw improvement in my energy and stamina after consistent use. Will definitely reorder.
Did not notice any difference even after 6 weeks of use. Maybe it works for others but not for me.
The capsule smell is very strong and unpleasant. Difficult to take without feeling nauseous.
Best quality ghee I have ever tasted. Rich flavour, authentic aroma, and you can tell it is made properly.
Excellent product but the price is on the higher side. Would buy more frequently if there was a better deal.
The ghee tastes off, not sure if it was stored properly during shipping. Very disappointed.
The powder dissolved well and I noticed improvement in my digestion and regularity within 10 days.
Genuine product with authentic taste. Effective for constipation relief and overall gut health.
The packaging leaked during delivery and half the powder was wasted. Really frustrating.
Bottle arrived completely damaged, the seal was broken and product had spilled all over the box.
The bottle packaging is excellent, very sturdy and the seal is tamper-proof. Great attention to quality.
Packaging is minimal and cheap-looking for a premium priced product. Expected better presentation.
Delivery was super fast, received within 24 hours of ordering. Packaging was intact and product was fresh.
Delivery took 12 days and the product was close to expiry when it arrived. Very poor logistics.
I had an issue with a damaged product and the customer support team resolved it within 2 hours with a full replacement.
The team was very helpful when I called with questions about dosage. Knowledgeable and patient.
Customer service took over a week to respond to my complaint. Completely unacceptable response time.
Pricing is reasonable compared to similar Ayurvedic brands. Good value for the quality you get.
This product is priced at a premium but the quality does not justify it. Overpriced for what it is.
Price went up by 30% in two months with no change in product. Feels exploitative.
The juice has a slightly fermented smell which makes it hard to consume. Wondering about freshness.
Received the wrong product in my order. The box said ashwagandha but capsules inside were different.
Reordering for the third time. Consistently good quality, fast delivery, and reasonable price. Highly recommend.
